pages.title: Dorvell Ferguson
paragraphs: Visual Storytelling through fashion, music, and movement

pages.title: Dorvell Ferguson - Portraits
paragraphs: Fashion - forward imagery focused on styling, mood, and visual storytelling.

pages.title: Dorvell Ferguson - Music & Live
paragraphs: High - energy concert and artist visuals capturing performance, atmosphere, and real moments in motion.

pages.title: Dorvell Ferguson - Sports / Athletics
paragraphs: Dynamic sports and performance imagery highlighting movement, intensity, and discipline.

Super thankful for the event the @hibbettofficial @hibbetttampaflorida team put together in Tampa, Florida in partnership with @nike I got the chance to give some game back to the youth ahead of March Madness, build real relationships that mean more than anything, and most importantly put smiles on the kids’ faces. Honestly, this is the type of stuff that means the most to me. Ever since I was a little kid, I always had a vision for moments like this… and to see it all coming together in ways I couldn’t even imagine is a true blessing. All glory to God. Thank you to Nike, thank you to Hibbett,

An exclusive GT Cut 4 pop-up experience, hosted by @hibbettofficial and @nike, made its way to Tampa. Bringing together local high school athletes blending performance, culture, and community. Creating an unforgettable experience. Huge THANKS and shoutout to @questvizi for bringing me in to help shoot this event! 🤞🏾 3/21/26
